header: One site, fifteen looks — per page
description:
Give any page subtree its own shadcn theme straight from the page properties. The preset inherits down the rootline and switches at runtime — your campaign goes Midnight while the rest of the site stays on brand.
No rebuild, ever.

card_image.title: Desiderio per-page theme preset field
card_image.alternative: TYPO3 page properties showing the Desiderio theme preset select field.
